zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Moravia於1178年出生在蘇格蘭奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯時，她的父親Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland19歲，母親Annabella MacDuff16歲。她和Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1247年在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林享年69歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾登布藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda de Moravia于1178年出生在苏格兰奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯时，她的父亲Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland19岁，母亲Annabella MacDuff16岁。她和Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1247年在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林享年69岁，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾登布藍。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Moravia was born in 1178, in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, her father, Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland, was 19 and her mother, Annabella MacDuff, was 16. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn. She died in 1247, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 69, and was buried in Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda de Moravia est née en 1178, à Orkney Islands, Orkney, Écosse, son père, Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Annabella MacDuff, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn. Elle est décédée en 1247, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda de Moravia 1178 in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland 19 und ihre Mutter Annabella MacDuff 16. Sie hatte mit Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1247 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland und wurde in Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda de Moraviaが1178年にスコットランドオルクニーオルクニー イスランズで生まれた時，父Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherlandは19歳，母Annabella MacDuffは16歳であった。彼女はSir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearnとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1247年にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで69歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアダンブランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Moravia(이)가 1178년 스컷랜드 르니 르니 이슬랜드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annabella MacDuff(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1247년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 던블랜에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Moravia родилась в 1178 г. в местности орни исландс, орни, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Annabella MacDuff, 16. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn. Она умерла в 1247 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности дунблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия.
